message:
test(labruntime): port 32 cleanup tests to RuntimeFixture (ft-22x4r)

Port all 32 #[tokio::test] async tests from cleanup.rs to the asupersync
RuntimeFixture pattern. Covers: empty DB, flat retention, tiered retention,
multi-table cleanup, zero-retention edge cases, consistency, E2E lifecycle,
event type filtering, and before/after stats verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
